title: iSegMan: Interactive Segment-and-Manipulate 3D Gaussians
title_zh: iSegMan：交互式分割与操作3D高斯体
abstract: The efficient rendering and explicit nature of 3DGS promote the advancement of 3D scene manipulation. However, existing methods typically encounter challenges in controlling the manipulation region and are unable to furnish the user with interactive feedback, which inevitably leads to unexpected results. Intuitively, incorporating interactive 3D segmentation tools can compensate for this deficiency. Nevertheless, existing segmentation frameworks impose a preprocessing step of scene-specific parameter training, which limits the efficiency and flexibility of scene manipulation. To deliver a 3D region control module that is well-suited for scene manipulation with reliable efficiency, we propose interactive Segment-and-Manipulate 3D Gaussians (iSegMan), an interactive segmentation and manipulation framework that only requires simple 2D user interactions in any view. To propagate user interactions to other views, we propose Epipolar-guided Interaction Propagation (EIP), which innovatively exploits epipolar constraint for efficient and robust interaction matching. To avoid scene-specific training to maintain efficiency, we further propose the novel Visibility-based Gaussian Voting (VGV), which obtains 2D segmentations from SAM and models the region extraction as a voting game between 2D Pixels and 3D Gaussians based on Gaussian visibility. Taking advantage of the efficient and precise region control of EIP and VGV, we put forth a Manipulation Toolbox to implement various functions on selected regions, enhancing the controllability, flexibility and practicality of scene manipulation. Extensive results on 3D scene manipulation and segmentation tasks fully demonstrate the significant advantages of iSegMan. Project page is available at https://zhao-yian.github.io/iSegMan.
abstract_zh: 3D高斯体（3DGS）的高效渲染和显式特性推动了3D场景操作的发展。然而，现有方法通常难以控制操作区域，且无法提供交互式反馈，导致意外结果。直观上，引入交互式3D分割工具可以弥补这一缺陷。但现有分割框架需要针对场景进行预处理参数训练，限制了操作效率和灵活性。为了提供一个适合场景操作且高效可靠的3D区域控制模块，我们提出了交互式分割与操作3D高斯体（iSegMan），一个仅需在任意视角进行简单2D用户交互的分割与操作框架。为了将用户交互传播到其他视角，我们提出了极线引导的交互传播（EIP），创新性地利用极线约束实现高效鲁棒的交互匹配。为了避免场景特定训练以保持效率，我们进一步提出了基于可见性的高斯投票（VGV），从SAM获取2D分割，并将区域提取建模为基于高斯可见性的2D像素与3D高斯之间的投票博弈。利用EIP和VGV高效精确的区域控制，我们提出了操作工具箱，在选定区域上实现多种功能，增强了场景操作的可控性、灵活性和实用性。在3D场景操作和分割任务上的大量结果充分展示了iSegMan的显著优势。项目页面：https://zhao-yian.github.io/iSegMan。
tldr_zh: 仅需2D交互即可实现3D场景的交互式分割与操作。
cover_zh: 点几下鼠标就能操控3D场景？这个框架让交互式编辑变得超简单！

>[!abstract] 一句话总结：提出iSegMan框架，包含极线约束引导的交互传播与基于可见性的高斯投票，实现快速、鲁棒的交互式3D分割和操纵。


# 一、动机

> 现有3D场景操纵方法难以精确控制操纵区域且缺乏交互反馈，而现有分割框架需要场景特定参数训练，效率低下。


# 二、方法

> 提出iSegMan框架，包含极线约束引导的交互传播与基于可见性的高斯投票，实现快速、鲁棒的交互式3D分割和操纵。


# 三、核心实验结果

> 在3D场景操纵和分割任务上表现显著优于现有方法，具体数值未在摘要中提供。


# 四、对我的启发

> 与课题不相关
